titleStmt.title: SII 4.1061: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1061. (A.R. No. 224 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tuṇai rājanmatiyaina mrā ytāṁba
nu bhāradvājapavitragōtruṇḍu nāśuṁbhanmū¨rtti sadva¨rtti volpāraṁggā nudiyiṁcceṁ brōlaṇḍu di sphuratkī¨rttiyai1 .
A¨rjjunakī¨rttilōluṇḍu sahasrakarōpamatējuṇḍā sahasrā¨rjjunapauruṣuṇḍu śacivāgraṇi santatapuṇyasaṁccayō . pā¨rjjitu ṇḍi
ṁdradhēnuditijābhavadānyuṇḍu daṇḍanāthanāgā¨rjjunu tammuṁ brōlaṇḍu dharāmaravaṁśalalāmuṇḍu¨rvvaranu [. 2*] Aṁbujaga¨rbhbhava
ṁśamaṇiyai dayaṁ baṭṭapumeṭṭa yagrahāraṁbuga nicci yaṁdda yuḍurājaśikhāmaṇiki nmarunnivāsaṁ besagaṁga nilpi vila
sanmatinoppina daṇḍanātharatnaṁbagu nāgadēvavibudhastutu tammuṇḍu vrōlaṇḍunnatini [. 3*] śakava¨rṣa 1071 neṇṭi viṣuvu
saṁkrānti nimittamuna śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalika boddanabhīmanamaṁtri gōraṇṭaprabhuvu mrānaya koḍku daṇḍanāya
kanāgadēvayya tammuṁ brōlaya śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍava¨rttilōhadaṇḍu diviya 1 ṇṭiki nā
caṁdrā¨rkkamu neyi sariṁccuvārugā bōlu nalvuruṁ būṇṭagā mupperi nāvabōla sōmani yaḍapuna kommanakāmani vasa
munaṁ beṭṭina InpaEḍlu 50 ṇṭiki nityapaḍi golavaṁggala tribhuvanāṁkkuśa nēmāna 1 . śrīmahitaṁbagu dākṣārāmapurā
dhipunaku surastavanunakunu . bhīmēśvarunaku natulasudhīmāṇikyu
Digital edition of SII 4.1061 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
